{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Maten Teia
| aliases = Teia
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Teia is [[Maten Kei]]'s sister.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Teia uses a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
